TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Samat ni Seejiq == Sbiyaw balay o mttuku balay uqun dha samat ka Truku, mnglung msa mkmkan ku samat ka seejiq do, asi knssayang "brut" msa dhuq ka samat, Niqan kingal jiyaxrmngaw ka kingal seejiq, mkmkan ku bi hiyi bowyak msa, ini qbsiyaq asi lu "brut" msa sriyu ka kingal bowyak da, hiya do smalak kingal ubal na, psaun na ruwan blehing ni gmukan, ini qbsiyaq do rwahan na ka bluhing ni asi htngay ska bluhing ka hiy bowyak. Babaw na nii, niqan kingal duri ka seejiq empeedawi, rmngaw msa mkmkan ku bi hiyi rqnux msa, ini qbsiyaq asi lu msa "brut" dhuq brah n aka rqnux, lmnglung ka seejiq empdawi nii, ma saw smtaga ni meekan knuwan kid aka jiyax smalak ubal ga!msa, kiya ni lungu na phqilun, qmita saw nii, msaang ni rmngaw ka rqnux "Bitaq saying mkmkan namu samayt o asimaku yahi hmadut sapah, rmngaww duri "Paah saying mha su mgsmay miying samat ni peekan ramus, aji su meangalana manu."
S.PHON: == samat ni səəɟiq == sbijaw balaj o mttuku balaj uqun dħa samat ka tɾuku, mŋluŋ msa mkmkan ku samat ka səəɟiq do, asi knssajaŋ "bɾut" msa dħuq ka samat, niqan kiŋal ɟijaxɾmŋaw ka kiŋal səəɟiq, mkmkan ku bi ħiji bowjak msa, ini qbsijaq asi lu "bɾut" msa sɾiju ka kiŋal bowjak da, ħija do smalak kiŋal ubal na, psaun na ɾuwan bləħiŋ ni gmukan, ini qbsijaq do ɾwaħan na ka bluħiŋ ni asi ħtŋaj ska bluħiŋ ka ħij bowjak. babaw na nii, niqan kiŋal duɾi ka səəɟiq əmpəədawi, ɾmŋaw msa mkmkan ku bi ħiji ɾqnux msa, ini qbsijaq asi lu msa "bɾut" dħuq bɾaħ n aka ɾqnux, lmŋluŋ ka səəɟiq əmpdawi nii, ma saw smtaga ni məəkan knuwan kid aka ɟijax smalak ubal ga!msa, kija ni luŋu na pħqilun, qmita saw nii, msaaŋ ni ɾmŋaw ka ɾqnux "bitaq sajiŋ mkmkan namu samajt o asimaku jaħi ħmadut sapaħ, ɾmŋaww duɾi "paaħ sajiŋ mħa su mgsmaj mijiŋ samat ni pəəkan ɾamus, aɟi su məaŋalana manu."
S.FORM: == Samat ni Seejiq == Sbiyaw balay o mttuku balay uqun dha samat ka Truku, mnglung msa mkmkan ku samat ka seejiq do, asi knssayang "brut" msa dhuq ka samat, Niqan kingal jiyaxrmngaw ka kingal seejiq, mkmkan ku bi hiyi bowyak msa, ini qbsiyaq asi lu "brut" msa sriyu ka kingal bowyak da, hiya do smalak kingal ubal na, psaun na ruwan blehing ni gmukan, ini qbsiyaq do rwahan na ka bluhing ni asi htngay ska bluhing ka hiy bowyak. Babaw na nii, niqan kingal duri ka seejiq empeedawi, rmngaw msa mkmkan ku bi hiyi rqnux msa, ini qbsiyaq asi lu msa "brut" dhuq brah n aka rqnux, lmnglung ka seejiq empdawi nii, ma saw smtaga ni meekan knuwan kid aka jiyax smalak ubal ga!msa, kiya ni lungu na phqilun, qmita saw nii, msaang ni rmngaw ka rqnux "Bitaq saying mkmkan namu samayt o asimaku yahi hmadut sapah, rmngaww duri "Paah saying mha su mgsmay miying samat ni peekan ramus, aji su meangalana manu."
S.PHON: == samat ni səəɟiq == sbijaw balaj o mttuku balaj uqun dħa samat ka tɾuku, mŋluŋ msa mkmkan ku samat ka səəɟiq do, asi knssajaŋ "bɾut" msa dħuq ka samat, niqan kiŋal ɟijaxɾmŋaw ka kiŋal səəɟiq, mkmkan ku bi ħiji bowjak msa, ini qbsijaq asi lu "bɾut" msa sɾiju ka kiŋal bowjak da, ħija do smalak kiŋal ubal na, psaun na ɾuwan bləħiŋ ni gmukan, ini qbsijaq do ɾwaħan na ka bluħiŋ ni asi ħtŋaj ska bluħiŋ ka ħij bowjak. babaw na nii, niqan kiŋal duɾi ka səəɟiq əmpəədawi, ɾmŋaw msa mkmkan ku bi ħiji ɾqnux msa, ini qbsijaq asi lu msa "bɾut" dħuq bɾaħ n aka ɾqnux, lmŋluŋ ka səəɟiq əmpdawi nii, ma saw smtaga ni məəkan knuwan kid aka ɟijax smalak ubal ga!msa, kija ni luŋu na pħqilun, qmita saw nii, msaaŋ ni ɾmŋaw ka ɾqnux "bitaq sajiŋ mkmkan namu samajt o asimaku jaħi ħmadut sapaħ, ɾmŋaww duɾi "paaħ sajiŋ mħa su mgsmaj mijiŋ samat ni pəəkan ɾamus, aɟi su məaŋalana manu."
